title: CLM 2.0 — Scaling Lifecycle Marketing with Governance & Real-Time Segmentation
subtitle: Establishing a centralized governance and real-time segmentation framework for scalable lifecycle marketing
role: MarTech Strategy, Lifecycle Architecture, Data Governance & Segmentation Design
overview: Club Mahindra set out to scale its Customer Lifecycle Marketing as memberships, resorts, and lines of business grew in complexity. Strong transactional and engagement data existed across EDW, CleverTap, SFMC, and booking systems — but CLM execution faced challenges due to fragmented governance, static segmentation, and delayed performance insights.

Phase II focused on moving from execution-heavy CRM to a governed, data-led lifecycle marketing model. Attributics was engaged to redesign the CLM operating framework — establishing governance controls, rebuilding segmentation strategy, and creating unified visibility across campaigns and channels.

challenge.subtitle: Fragmented Governance
challenge.description: With multiple lines of business (LOBs), channels, and campaign teams operating independently, there was no centralized framework to manage messaging frequency, lifecycle priority, or channel conflicts. This led to over-messaging, inconsistent member experiences, and campaign overlaps.

challenge.subtitle: Static Segmentation
challenge.description: Audience segments were manually defined and infrequently updated, making them disconnected from actual member behavior. Campaigns were going out to broad, poorly qualified audiences rather than members at the right lifecycle stage.

challenge.subtitle: Delayed Performance Insights
challenge.description: Campaign performance data was scattered across platforms and required significant manual effort to compile. Marketing teams lacked the real-time visibility needed to act quickly on what was or wasn't working.

challenge.subtitle: Identity & Data Quality Issues
challenge.description: During implementation, profile merge issues were identified — multiple profiles created for the same user across different identifiers (mobile number, email ID, device ID). This led to duplicate profiles, segmentation inconsistencies, and incorrect targeting. A related issue with the $D identity parameter caused events to be mapped to incorrect profiles, affecting behavioral segmentation accuracy.

challenge.subtitle: Platform Constraints
challenge.description: Journey design in CleverTap is subject to a maximum of 40 nodes in split conditions and a limit of 100 journeys. These constraints required careful planning to avoid hitting limits as CLM complexity scaled.

solution.subtitle: Lifecycle Governance & Control
solution.description: Establish centralized governance for messaging frequency, lifecycle priority, suppressions, and channel conflicts across all LOBs.

solution.subtitle: Advanced Segmentation Strategy
solution.description: Replace static, manual segments with dynamic, behaviour- and intent-led segmentation across the CLM lifecycle.

solution.subtitle: Reporting & Visibility
solution.description: Improve campaign performance monitoring with unified dashboards and faster access to insights.

solution.subtitle: CLM Scalability
solution.description: Create a structured, scalable foundation to support future lifecycle orchestration and personalisation growth.

process.title: Governance Framework
process.description: Established centralized lifecycle definitions, messaging frequency caps, channel prioritization, and suppression logic. Implemented a unified campaign calendar to eliminate overlaps and ensure consistent communication across lines of business.

process.title: Segmentation & Audience Strategy
process.description: Replaced static segmentation with dynamic, behavior-driven audiences using transactional and engagement signals. Standardized event taxonomy across platforms and enabled self-updating segments aligned with real-time user intent.

process.title: Channel Enablement & Execution
process.description: Configured CleverTap for omnichannel communication across SMS, WhatsApp, Email, RCS, In-App, and Webhooks. Executed both automated lifecycle journeys and adhoc campaigns for promotions and transactional messaging.

process.title: Reporting & Analytics
process.description: Built unified dashboards to track campaign performance, engagement metrics, and lifecycle movement. Enabled cohort and predictive analysis to improve targeting and accelerate insight-to-action cycles.

techStack.title: Channels
techStack.description: SMS, WhatsApp, Email, RCS, In-App, Webhook

conclusion: Through a structured, data-led approach, Attributics helped Club Mahindra evolve its CLM from campaign execution to a governed, performance-driven operating model. By embedding a centralised governance framework, rebuilding segmentation strategy, and unifying performance visibility, Club Mahindra gained consistent control over its member communications — reducing over-messaging, improving campaign relevance, and creating a scalable foundation for sustained lifecycle marketing growth.
